milestones.title: Chetana Education Society Founded
milestones.description: Founded by Shri Dinesh Baliram Sawai in Wardha, Maharashtra, with a conviction that quality education is the most lasting instrument of human dignity.

milestones.title: Chetana D.Ed College Established
milestones.description: Diploma in Education college established to train teachers for rural Maharashtra.

milestones.title: Dr. Ambedkar College of Social Work Established
milestones.description: College of Social Work established in Wardha to train social workers for underserved communities.

milestones.title: Mahatma Jotirao Phule College of Social Work, Yavatmal
milestones.description: Second College of Social Work established, extending CES's reach to Yavatmal district.

milestones.title: Amrapali Orphanage Girls' Hostel Established
milestones.description: Safe residential facility established for orphaned and underprivileged girls.

milestones.title: Ramdas Magaswargiy Boys' Hostel Established
milestones.description: Free residential hostel for underprivileged boys — providing accommodation, food, and support at no cost since 1994.

milestones.title: Dr. Ambedkar Credit Cooperative Society Formed
milestones.description: Dr. Ambedkar Teachers' and Non-Teaching Employees' Credit Cooperative Society formed to support staff financial welfare.

milestones.title: CES Granted Minority Institution Status
milestones.description: Chetana Education Society officially granted Minority Institution status by the government.

milestones.title: Chetana B.Ed College Established
milestones.description: Bachelor of Education college established, affiliated to RTMNU Nagpur. Over 60% of students are women — many the first professional in their families.

milestones.title: Chetana ITI Established
milestones.description: NCVT-registered Industrial Training Institute established offering Electrician and Fitter trades, with direct placement support across Maharashtra.

milestones.title: Oxford Public School & Chetana Junior College Established
milestones.description: Oxford Public School (Waigaon) and Chetana Junior College (Science stream) established, bringing quality schooling to rural Wardha.

milestones.title: Subhedar Ramji Ambedkar Community Library Established
milestones.description: Community library established to promote reading and learning in the local community.

milestones.title: Chetana Institute of Pharmacy Established
milestones.description: D.Pharm institute established, affiliated to MSBTE Mumbai, with special focus on women students from rural backgrounds.

milestones.title: Sakal Idols of Maharashtra Award — Education Category
milestones.description: Chetana Education Society honoured with the prestigious Sakal Idols of Maharashtra 2022 Award in the Education category.

milestones.title: Framework MoU Signed with Dhammakaya Foundation, Thailand
milestones.description: CES signed a Framework Memorandum of Understanding with the Dhammakaya Foundation, Thailand (through its Indian branch, Dhammacakka Foundation Trust) — CES's first international partnership, marking the beginning of joint education and community development programmes in India.
